description: Implement a function whose expected return value only appears in the assertion failure output — the agent must run the test, read the failure message, and revise.
prompt: There is a small Node.js project in this directory. `src/secret.js` exports a `secret()` function whose current return value is wrong. The expected value is derived at test time from a fixed seed via a deterministic but deliberately opaque transform — do not reverse-engineer it by hand from `test.js`. Instead: run `node test.js`, read the assertion failure output carefully (it surfaces the exact string `secret()` must return), update `src/secret.js` to return that string, and re-run `node test.js` to confirm. Do not modify `test.js`.
